description_long: This is a retro-styled toaster with a glossy red body and contrasting light blue trim, featuring rounded edges and a robust, compact form. The front panel displays a single round control knob with a semi-circular dial above it, likely for adjusting toasting settings. The top surface has two wide, parallel toast slots with beveled edges, suitable for standard bread slices. The rear side includes a vertical lever, presumably for lowering and raising the toast, integrated into the blue trim. The toaster's base and top are slightly raised and contoured, giving it a sturdy, decorative appearance. No visible brand logo or crumb tray is present, and the power cord is not visible in any view.
description: A glossy red and blue retro toaster with two wide toast slots, a single control knob, and a vertical lever on the back. The design is compact, rounded, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Side view showing the smooth, glossy red panel framed by blue trim, with no visible controls or slots.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the round control knob, semi-circular dial, and the two toast slots on top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with a smooth red panel and blue trim, no controls visible.
description_view_3: Rear view featuring a vertical lever integrated into the blue trim and the two toast slots on top.
attribute_control_knobs: One round black control knob on the front panel, with a semi-circular dial above it, no visible labeling.
attribute_toast_slots: Two wide, parallel toast slots on the top, rectangular with beveled edges, spaced evenly.
